# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: example-istio
spec:
  components:
    ingressGateways:
      - name: istio-ingress
        enabled: true
    egressGateways:
      - name: istio-egress
        enabled: true
  meshConfig:
    proxyMetadata:
      PROXY_ADMIN_PORT: "15000"
    accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
    accessLogEncoding: TEXT
    enableTracing: true
    enablePrometheus: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        accessLogLevel: "DEBUG"
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        includeIPInRequestLog: true
        logLevel: "info"
        statusPort: 15020
      configValidation: true
  customResources:
    - type: "EnvoyFilter"
      name: allow-admin-endpoints
      namespace: istio-system
      spec:
        configPatches:
          - applyTo: ROUTER
            match:
              context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND
            patch:
              operation: MERGE
              value:
                routes:
                  - match:
                      prefix: "/config_dump"
                    route:
                      cluster: "outbound|15000|tcp|istio-pilot.istio-system.svc.cluster.local"
                  - match:
                      prefix: "/stats"
                    route:
                      cluster: "outbound|15000|tcp|istio-pilot.istio-system.svc.cluster.local"
                  - match:
                      prefix: "/clusters"
                    route:
                      cluster: "outbound|15000|tcp|istio-pilot.istio-system.svc.cluster.local"
